calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MATTER COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE, WITH STEVEN TAXMAN, JUDGE PRO TEM, IN DEPT. 306A.THE PARTIES REACHED A STIPULATION WHICH WAS PLACED ON THE RECORD. THE STIPULATION AND ORDER WAS SIGNED THIS DATE. DEFENDANT IS TO VACATE THE PREMISES OF 44 MC ALLISTER ST.,#519, S.F. CALIFORNIA, BY JULY 20, 2004. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION SHALL BE STAYED TO THAT DATE., ALTHOUGH THE PREMISES SHALL BE POSTED FOR EVICTION PRIOR TO THAT TIME. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES SHALL BE DEEMED THE PROPERTY OF THE PLAINTIFF, AND THE DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY RIGHTS IN REGARD TO SAID PROPERTY AND ITS DISPOSAL. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHTS TO ANY APPEAL, FURTHER STAY, OR NEW TRIAL. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY NO FURTHER RENT, AND HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT SHALL BE RETURNED ACCORDING TO THE LAW. IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES ON JULY 20, 2004, THE PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THE SURRENDER. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A NEUTRAL REFERENCE FOR DEFENDANT, AND SHALL RESPECT DEFT'S RIGHT TO PRIVACY AND QUIET ENJOYMENT, ETC. STIPULATION AND ORDER SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE.TRIAL DATE OF JUNE 7, 2004, IS VACATED. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN TAXMAN;CLERK-BBSURRATT;REPORTER-JANET POND. (DEPT. 306A)
